text:
PARIS, France — Members of the French police force recently visited the Jamaica Hospitality House at the Olympic Village in Paris where they were treated to a refreshing drink of coconut water and other luxurious amenities.

The Jamaica Hospitality House offers a unique opportunity to experience the island’s culture, music, and cuisine in Paris.

At the hospitality house, visitors can enjoy Jamaican music and taste delicious Jamaican food from popular brands like Red Stripe, Port Royal Patties, and Grace Foods.

Members of the French police force share a moment at the Jamaica Hospitality House at the Olympic Village in Paris.

It will operate from August 3 to 8 between noon and 10:00 pm Central European Summer Time (CEST) and August 11 between 8:00 pm and 10:00 pm CEST.

It also functions as a meeting point for fans, athletes and officials.
